title: Community Workbench SDK
description: The Community Workbench SDK provides developers and researchers with programmatic tools to build, extend, and integrate custom analysis modules within the Parthenon platform. The SDK exposes APIs and scaffolding to create reproducible study packages, custom visualisations, and third-party data integrations.
tips: Review the SDK documentation and sample templates before building a new module to align with platform conventions and ensure compatibility.
Use the provided package scaffolding to structure your analysis code so it can be exported and executed at federated sites.
Validate your SDK module against a local data source before submitting it for network-wide distribution.
Leverage the built-in logging and error-handling hooks to make troubleshooting straightforward for end users.
Engage the community forum to share your extensions and incorporate feedback from researchers at other institutions.
